Summary
Medical equipment manufacturer and distributor focused on sterilization systems, upgrades, rentals, repairs, and service. Customers appear to be clinics, hospitals, and medical practices.
Strong fit for Manufacturing, Warehousing, and Distribution with a heavy service and equipment layer. This is a complex quote to cash and service operation rather than simple sales CRM usage.
~39 employees with ~45 estimated users. 15 licensed Method users actively working across sales, service, and finance.
Long term Method customer. Signed up August 2023. Deep adoption with extensive customizations and ongoing DEP work through 2025 and 2026.
Annual prepay subscription. Monthly equivalent cost ~$688 with meaningful pack coverage across sales, service, and operations. Shows commitment and budget ownership.
Contact Management, Sales Transactions, Sales Pipeline, Purchase Transactions, Email Campaigns, Work Orders, Field Crew, Time Tracking, Equipment, plus many custom apps.
Heavy use of custom apps including Equipment, Companies, Purchase History, Credit Memo, Commission, Email Status. Method is acting as a system of record beyond CRM.
Estimates to sales orders to invoices, equipment tracking, rentals and leases, service and repair work orders, purchase orders, commissions, and customer communications.
QuickBooks Online Advanced is the financial source of truth. Method handles operational logic, workflow, UI, and data orchestration around QuickBooks.
Ongoing UI and logic improvements such as invoice grids, bulk printing, custom fields syncing to QBO, print templates, email tracking, and inventory visibility.
Dedicated Enhancement Plan active since November 2024. Regular monthly work with a consistent consultant. Customization requests are incremental and operational, not experimental.
Very high. Their requests indicate clear internal processes and a desire to remove friction, reduce clicks, and improve visibility rather than redesign workflows.
Uses dashboards, reports, charts, email campaigns, field crew, and work order analytics. This is not light CRM usage.
Multiple champions across sales, operations, and leadership including Craig, Kelsea, Angelique, and others. Adoption is not tied to a single user.
High. Annual prepay, DEP engagement, continuous enhancement requests, and broad user adoption signal long term stickiness.
Excellent reference account for Manufacturing plus Service positioning, Customizable CRM story, DEP value, and QuickBooks centric operations at scale.
